package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for generic_base_repository_with_reflection_dispatch: Catch-all repositories that depend on reflection-heavy generic CRUD instead of bounded repository APIs.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule035NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule035NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule035NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario035Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule035NegativeService, input Rule035NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
